html:
“While stocked with Cut Grass and Logs, Guard Merm will grab a Swamp Brawler Helmet from it, reducing its stores.
Swamp Brawler Helmets are a cheap way for a merm to get 50% protection from damage for a short while.”

-

The Armermry is a special structure that can only be built by Wurt with the "Hardheaded I" skill and can be placed only on Marsh Turf. Merm Guards that are close to this structure and do not have an item equipped on their head will craft for themselves a Swamp Brawler Helmet and equip it. Every craft of the Swamp Brawler Helmet by Merm Guards will use 1 Log and 1 Cut Grass. Upon built, the Armermry will hold 5 Logs and 5 Cut Grass. If an Armermry does not have enough resources, its door will open. Merm Guards with a Swamp Brawler Helmet will have 30% protection from damage.

The Armermry can be filled with Logs and Cut Grass only by Wurt or any Character with Clever Disguise.

Superior Armermry

“While stocked with Cut Grass and Logs, Guard Merm will grab a Swamp Warrior Helmet from it, reducing its stores.
Swamp Warrior Helmets are a better design over their Brawler cousin, providing 70% resistance from damage for a longer period of time.”

-

The Superior Armermry is a special structure that can only be built by Wurt with the "Hardheaded II" skill and can be placed only on Marsh Turf. Merm Guards that are close to this structure and do not have an item equipped on their head will craft for themselves a Swamp Warrior Helmet and equip it. Every craft of the Swamp Warrior Helmet by Merm Guards will use 1 Log and 1 Cut Grass. Upon built, the Superior Armermry will hold 5 Logs and 5 Cut Grass. If an Superior Armermry does not have enough resources, its door will open. Merm Guards with Swamp Warrior Helmet will have 50% protection from damage.

The Superior Armermry can be filled with Logs and Cut Grass only by Wurt or any Character with Clever Disguise.

Tips

  • You can first build an Armermry or Superior Armermry with the necessary skills and then respawn your Wurt at the Celestial Portal with different selected skills. This will allow you to fill an Armermry with resources without the "Hardheaded I" or "Hardheaded II" skills.

Gallery

  • Shoddy Tool Shed concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Armermry Burnt

Armermry
Full
Empty
"No merm should charge into battle without a well-fitting helmet."
Object Info
Can be Burned
Crafting
×2 ×5 ×5 ( only)
Filters
(for ).
Miscellaneous
"merm_armory"
“It says "Mermfolk Ownlee."”
–Wilson
“I can't look inside? But that just makes me want to even more!”
–Willow
“For fish man only.”
–Wolfgang
“"Mermfolk Ownlee"... hmph. How childish.”
–Wendy
“IT IS POORLY BUILT”
–WX-78
“"Mermfolk Ownlee"? Hm. I see more spelling lessons are in order.”
–Wickerbottom
“We're not welcome here, Luce.”
–Woodie
“Apparently, I'm not invited. Oh how shall I ever go on.”
–Maxwell
“The armöry öf the fish beast warriörs.”
–Wigfrid
“They don't seem to like sharing their toys.”
–Webber
“The fishmongers seem to be doing quite well for themselves.”
–Warly
“Glub Glub only”
–Wormwood
“Get your merm hats here!”
–Winona
“A Merm millinery.”
–Wortox
“Making Mermfolk fighting hat.”
–Wurt
“Aww, can't I just take a little peek inside?”
–Walter
“I doubt there's anything in there worth my time.”
–Wanda
